title: Is it possible to create an email template and send email with automation?
excerpt: Sorry, I’m new to Monday. I read that I can use HTML, but I don’t know how. Is there an easy way to create templates like the Mailchimp email builder?

posts.author: Martin1 (Martin)
posts.cookedHtml: Sorry, I’m new to Monday. I read that I can use HTML, but I don’t know how. Is there an easy way to create templates like the Mailchimp email builder?

posts.author: Yash.Gangani (Yash Gangani)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Martin1

Check out EasyMails, this app allows you to easily create templates using a drag-and-drop editor. You can also send emails using pre-defined recipes for added convenience.

posts.author: donald795 (donald)
posts.cookedHtml:
Martin:

Sorry, I’m new to Monday. I read that I can use HTML, but I don’t know how. Is there an easy way to create templates like the Mailchimp email builder?

Hello,
In Monday.com, you can use HTML to customize various elements within your boards and items. While there isn’t a built-in email builder like Mailchimp, you can create templates with HTML directly within the platform. Start by accessing the column settings or item details where you want to apply the HTML customization. Then use HTML tags and inline styles to format text, images and other content as desired. You can also utilize CSS for more advanced styling. While this approach may require some coding knowledge, it offers flexibility in designing templates tailored to your needs. Alternatively, you can explore third party integrations or apps within Monday.com that may provide more advanced template building capabilities.

posts.author: Martin1 (Martin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @donald795,

Thank you for suggesting ideas. However, I don’t have knowledge of HTML. I am using the EasyMails App to create email templates. It has a drag-and-drop designer, which is exactly what I was looking for. It’s very easy to use, and I can share templates with my team, attach files from columns, and send bulk emails. The support team has been really helpful.

posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Martin1 ,
If you’re looking to create an email template and send email with automation,

You can create [email templates, send them using automations, track whether they’ve been opened, and manage all your correspondence directly from there.
